frontmatter_compliance.notes: Description 1388 chars — exceeds 1024 hard ceiling (hard FAIL per audit-checklist). Semver OK; allowed-tools hyphenated; missing compatibility / metadata.

coordination.notes: composes_with includes ux-review + feature-dev and spawned_by includes ux-review — none exist in repo skills/. Orchestrator reciprocates render-sanity heavily.

completeness.notes: Body self-contained; report template fully specified; workflow concrete. Missing: extracted references; example completed reports.

anti_patterns.notes: One justified MUST-style rule; no emojis; no hardcoded paths; tight focus.
